name: CV Scanning
description: When a Google Forms response is submitted, downloads the attached CV PDF from Google Drive, extracts its text, and summarizes it with AI. OpenAI scores the candidate from 0 to 10 against a Senior Java Developer job description. The name, email, summary, and score are recorded in a Google Sheet, and the CV file is filed into a Rejected or Potential candidates Google Drive folder based on the score.
keyFeatures: PDF text extraction from the uploaded CV
AI structured summary of the CV
AI candidate scoring against a job description
Condition-based file sorting into Google Drive folders
prerequisites: Google Drive connection with the Rejected and Potential candidate folders
Google Sheets connection with the target spreadsheet
idealFor: Recruiters and hiring teams that want to pre-screen and triage incoming job applications automatically.
steps: Trigger: a Google Forms response is submitted.
Download the candidate's CV PDF from Google Drive.
Summarize the CV text with AI.
Score the candidate from 0 to 10 against the job description with OpenAI.
Record the name, email, summary, and score in a Google Sheet.
Condition: if the score is 0, file the CV in Rejected Candidates; otherwise in Potential Candidates.
